Dior Book Tote Shopping Bag
Inspired by Creative Director Maria Grazia Chiuri, this Book Tote is a flagship piece embodying Dior's aesthetic. items.name_cn:
High Version
#D-Vibe East-West Micro Bag 'Black Houndstooth'
This D-Vibe East-West Micro Bag is a new addition to the 2025 Spring-Summer Ready-to-Wear collection, offering a modern silhouette that enriches the D-Vibe line. Crafted with care from materials like black houndstooth, it is decorated with a white trellis pattern and accented with smooth black calfskin details. A practical style with a slip pocket for easy storage of daily essentials, featuring a top leather handle and an adjustable, detachable shoulder strap for hand, shoulder, or crossbody wear.
Zip closure
1 compartment
Internal slip pocket
Adjustable, detachable leather shoulder strap
Model: 2388
Dimensions: 20.5 x 13 x 5 cm (L x H x W)
Fits 1 mobile phone, 1 card holder, and lipstick

items.name_en: High-end GG Marmont Series Black Gunmetal
items.name_cn:
High-end GG Marmont Series Black Gunmetal
GG Marmont Series metal chain mini shoulder bag, soft structured, oversized flap accented with double G hardware. The new colorway features quilted V-shaped leather paired with monochrome hardware. The adjustable chain strap is ingeniously designed, offering versatile ways to wear it, freely switching between shoulder and hand-carry.
Size: 26*15*7cm
Style No.: 443497

specs.rawTitle:

Size: 26*15*7cm

A new member of the 1955 family,
Innovating on the classic ,
